Identify signs, symptoms, and potential complications from chickenpox. 
Vaccination 
Learn about chickenpox vaccine basics, who should get it, when to get it, and why it's important.

Clinical Overview

Key Resources
Lab Testing 
Learn about lab testing for varicella-zoster virus (VZV), the cause of chickenpox and shingles. 
Collecting Specimens for VZV Testing 
Learn about collecting and shipping specimens for VZV testing, and sources for suitable supplies. 
Guidance for People at High Risk 
Learn about clinical guidance and treatment for patients at high risk of severe chickenpox. 
Reporting and Surveillance 
Learn about varicella case reporting and definitions, deaths, and other surveillance resources. 
Varicella Outbreak Control 
Learn how CDC works with state health departments to monitor varicella outbreaks.
